patterns.application_setup: Use @HiltAndroidApp annotation on Application class to enable Hilt
patterns.module_pattern: Create separate modules for different concerns (app-level, database, network, etc.)
patterns.scope_pattern: Use @Singleton for app-level dependencies, @ViewModelScoped for ViewModels
patterns.injection_pattern: Use @Inject constructor for dependency injection, @Module and @InstallIn for providing dependencies

existing_implementations.description: This is a greenfield project with no existing code. Following standard Android + Hilt patterns from official documentation.
